caption: A split-screen video features a woman with red hair wearing a blue patterned shirt and a man with glasses, a beard, and a blue collared shirt. They appear to be in separate indoor locations; the man is in a room with a light-colored wall, a framed picture, and a sign that partially reads "PEN." A blue banner across the bottom of the screen contains the text "FOCUS with Margaret Harrington" on the left, and "No More Time Climate Crisis Poems by Greg Delanty" on the right, alongside a "TOWN MEETING TV" logo. As the sequence progresses, the woman and man are seen talking, with their facial expressions and mouth movements shifting. Suddenly, the entire scene is replaced by a close-up shot of a lion's face, focusing on its eyes and snout, which fills the entire frame.
